full_text:
Sima Fang (Jiangong) 司馬防 (建公)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Fang (司馬防), styledJiangong (建公), was born in Henei. Sima Yi’s father. An honest hermit who had a sense of public duty. Sima Fang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Sima Fang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
